contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 55
- Description: Nelanco Claude Code box Gate C laydown + Sophia migration plan
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/661
  
  Details:
  Completed Gate C of the Nelanco interactive Claude Code box and drafted the Sophia migration roadmap. (1) Cloned all 47 workspace repos onto the box into /opt/claude_workspace (TrueSightDAO + KrakeIO via the appropriate PATs, remotes scrubbed to clean HTTPS). (2) Mirrored 64 gitignored secret files (.envs, Google SAs, Gmail/OAuth tokens, .pem keys, DAO identities) + 3 clasp tokens onto the box preserving layout, perms 600. (3) Fleet SSH parity: copied sophia_infra to the box (fleet already authorizes it) rather than distributing a new key to 14 prod hosts for zero added isolation; wrote all 14 fleet aliases into the box ssh config; verified the full DAO/Agroverse fleet is reachable+authenticated (dao_protocol, seni_ror, seni_sk, seni_sql, seni_redis, getdata_redis). (4) Box git: Claude Anthropic identity + DAO-PAT credential helper (HTTPS push verified) + generated a dedicated ed25519 push key. (5) Wrote plans/SOPHIA_NELANCO_MIGRATION_PLAN.md (blue-green M1..M6 to relocate Sophia from Explorya to Nelanco). Only remaining step is Gary's interactive claude login. Merged as PR #661.
- Contributor(s): Claude Anthropic
- TDG Issued: 91.67
